description:
Welcome to Episode 1 of Life at the Ranch! An intimate look at the world I’ve built away from the cameras.
For years, you’ve seen me rehabilitate dogs around the world. But I’ve always had a dream of a place where nature does the talking and silence is the first language. Welcome to the series premiere of Life at the Ranch.
In this first episode, I'm taking you behind the gates of my personal sanctuary to explain the why behind it all. This isn't just a ranch tour; it’s an introduction to a new

title: Why I Built my own Dog Paradise | Life at the Ranch
